children.heading: Assignment of internal revenue officers
children.label: a Assignment of internal revenue officers
children.text: The Secretary is authorized to assign to any premises established under the provisions of this chapter such number of internal revenue officers as may be deemed necessary.

children.heading: Functions of internal revenue officer
children.label: b Functions of internal revenue officer
children.text: When used in this chapter, the term “internal revenue officer assigned to the premises” means the internal revenue officer assigned by the Secretary to duties at premises established and operated under the provisions of this chapter.
